_comment: Magic: The Gathering sealed products. packsContained is a physical fact (Play Booster boxes are 30 packs for 2025+ sets, 36 for earlier 2024 sets like Bloomburrow). WotC sets no official box MSRP, so msrpCents is the suggested per-pack price times the pack count (standard Play Booster SRP ~$4.99; Final Fantasy premium ~$6.99) — a retail-ROI reference, while marketCents is the current street price with provenance that drives the market ROI. Pack EV is modelled from the disclosed Play Booster collation (see data/pullrates/mtg), which is closer to official than the Pokémon/One Piece community estimates but still capped at LOW confidence because special treatments are folded into flat rarity tiers.

products.name: Play Booster Box (30 packs)
products.marketSource: Walmart listing (Final Fantasy Play Booster Display, 30 packs), 2026-07-23
products.contentsNote: 30 Play Boosters, 14 cards each. Universes Beyond premium set.

products.name: Play Booster Box (36 packs)
products.contentsNote: 36 Play Boosters, 14 cards each (earlier Play Booster box configuration).
